content:
# Numbers Chapter 5 — The SOPHIA Bible (Consensus)
**Arbiter:** SOPHIA | **In council with:** EMET, LOGOS, PNEUMA
**Source Manuscript:** Leningrad Codex (B19A), pp. 152–153; Codex Vaticanus (Vat.gr.1209), pa_0114–0115 (LXX) | **Source Images:** `source-texts/hebrew-OT/NUM_005_page_001.jpg`, `NUM_005_page_002.jpg`; `source-texts/greek-OT-LXX/NUM_005_vaticanus_page_001.jpg`, `NUM_005_vaticanus_page_002.jpg`

---

## Expulsion of the Unclean (vv. 1–4)

**5:1** And YHWH spoke to Moses, saying:

**5:2** "Command the Sons of Israel that they send out from the camp every leper, and everyone having a discharge, and everyone who is unclean by a dead person.

**5:3** Both male and female you shall send out; to the outside of the camp you shall send them, that they may not defile their camps, in the midst of which I dwell."

**5:4** And the Sons of Israel did so, and they sent them to the outside of the camp; as YHWH spoke to Moses, so the Sons of Israel did.

---

## Restitution for Trespass (vv. 5–10)

**5:5** And YHWH spoke to Moses, saying:

**5:6** "Speak to the Sons of Israel: When a man or a woman commits any of the sins of mankind, by acting unfaithfully against YHWH, and that person is guilty,

**5:7** then they shall confess their sin which they have committed, and he shall make restitution for his guilt in full, and shall add to it one-fifth, and shall give it to the one against whom he incurred guilt.

**5:8** And if the man has no kinsman-redeemer to whom restitution may be made for the guilt, the restitution made for guilt shall be to YHWH, for the priest, besides the ram of the atonement by which atonement is made for him.

**5:9** And every contribution of all the holy things of the Sons of Israel which they bring to the priest shall be his.

**5:10** And each man's holy things shall be his; whatever a man gives to the priest shall be his."

---

## The Ordeal of Jealousy — The Sotah (vv. 11–31)

**5:11** And YHWH spoke to Moses, saying:

**5:12** "Speak to the Sons of Israel and say to them: If any man's wife goes astray and acts unfaithfully against him,

**5:13** and a man lies with her carnally, and it is hidden from the eyes of her husband, and she is concealed, having defiled herself, and there is no witness against her, and she was not caught --

**5:14** and a spirit of jealousy comes upon him, and he is jealous of his wife, and she has defiled herself; or a spirit of jealousy comes upon him, and he is jealous of his wife, though she has not defiled herself --

**5:15** then the man shall bring his wife to the priest, and he shall bring her offering for her: one-tenth of an ephah of barley flour. He shall not pour oil on it, nor shall he put frankincense on it, for it is a grain offering of jealousy, a grain offering of memorial, bringing iniquity to remembrance.

**5:16** And the priest shall bring her near and shall set her before YHWH.

**5:17** And the priest shall take holy water in an earthen vessel, and of the dust that is on the floor of the Tabernacle the priest shall take and put into the water.

**5:18** And the priest shall set the woman before YHWH and shall uncover the head of the woman, and shall place upon her hands the grain offering of memorial -- it is the grain offering of jealousy -- and in the hand of the priest shall be the bitter water that brings the curse.

**5:19** And the priest shall make her swear and shall say to the woman: 'If no man has lain with you, and if you have not gone astray into uncleanness while under your husband, be free from this bitter water that brings the curse.

**5:20** But if you have gone astray while under your husband, and if you have defiled yourself, and a man other than your husband has lain with you' --

**5:21** then the priest shall make the woman swear with the oath of the curse, and the priest shall say to the woman -- 'May YHWH make you a curse and an oath among your people, when YHWH makes your thigh fall away and your belly swell,

**5:22** and this water that brings the curse shall enter into your bowels, to make the belly swell and the thigh fall away.' And the woman shall say: 'Amen, amen.'

**5:23** And the priest shall write these curses in a scroll and shall wash them off into the bitter water.

**5:24** And he shall make the woman drink the bitter water that brings the curse, and the water that brings the curse shall enter into her and become bitter.

**5:25** And the priest shall take the grain offering of jealousy from the hand of the woman, and shall wave the grain offering before YHWH, and shall bring it to the altar.

**5:26** And the priest shall take a handful of the grain offering as its memorial portion, and shall burn it on the altar, and afterward shall make the woman drink the water.

**5:27** And when he has made her drink the water, then it shall be, if she has defiled herself and has acted unfaithfully against her husband, the water that brings the curse shall enter into her and become bitter, and her belly shall swell, and her thigh shall fall away, and the woman shall become a curse among her people.

**5:28** And if the woman has not defiled herself and is clean, then she shall be free, and she shall be sown with seed.

**5:29** This is the law of jealousy, when a wife goes astray while under her husband and defiles herself,

**5:30** or when a spirit of jealousy comes upon a man and he is jealous of his wife; then he shall set the woman before YHWH, and the priest shall carry out for her all this law.

**5:31** And the man shall be free from iniquity, but that woman shall bear her iniquity."
